title: Pearl And Dean Ride Again
description: After a sell out run at Brighton Fringe 2025 and being shortlisted for 3 awards - including best new show - Pearl and Dean are back with a brand new offering! Join the most "heterosexual" couple in show biz, for more high jinks on the high seas. Climb aboard our cruise ship, the Watery Queen, to hear tales of our brief spell in the pop charts with our critically acclaimed album "Separate Beds". Find out which Nashville Ingénue reworked our greatest hit and made herself a fortune. Delve deep into the private lives of Peter and Marsha and find out just why "Love Will Keep Us Together" even if fame and fortune continues to evade us... Expect new songs, new costumes, new hair and tall tales from the shallow end of showbiz. Join us for an unforgettable evening of singing and swinging aboard the Watery Queen! Pearl and Dean Ride Again - it's a "hull" new world!
content_warnings: Warning: Pearl and Dean may just tickle you pink!

venue.name: Komedia Studio
venue.address: 44-47 Gardner Street, 44-46 Gardner Street, East Sussex
